name: New Service Creation
notes: This rule detects the creation of a new service.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: New Service Creation Using PowerShell
BB:BehaviorDefinition: New Service Creation Using Sc.EXE
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: New Service Creation Using PowerShell, BB:BehaviorDefinition: New Service Creation Using Sc.EXE
TD_list: APPLY New Service Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: New Service Creation Using PowerShell, BB:BehaviorDefinition: New Service Creation Using Sc.EXE
RED_list: Event description: Detects the creation of a new service
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
